mapper.select:
select c.id as noticeId, 0 as targetId, case when c.notice_type=1 then 1 when c.notice_type=2 or c.notice_type=3 then 2 else c.notice_type end as noticeType, c.notice_title_i18n_code, c.message_content_i18n_code, c.target_type, c.status ,c.created_time as createdTime
,0 as readState
from user_notice_config c, agent_info ag
where c.target_type = 4 and c.status=0 and ag.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} and not exists ( select t.notice_id from user_notice_target t where t.notice_id = c.id and t.user_account = #{vo.agentAccount} )
and c.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType}
and c.notice_type in(2,3)
and c.created_time >= ag.register_time
and c.carousel_start_time <= #{vo.currentTime} and c.carousel_end_time >= #{vo.currentTime}
union SELECT case when c2.id is null then 0 ELSE c2.id end as noticeId, t2.id AS targetId, t2.notice_type, c2.notice_title_i18n_code, c2.message_content_i18n_code, t2.notice_type , c2.STATUS, case when c2.created_time is null then t2.created_time else c2.created_time end as createdTime, t2.read_state AS readState from user_notice_target t2 Left join user_notice_config c2 on c2.id = t2.notice_id
where t2.user_id = #{vo.agentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t2.revoke_state = 1
and t2.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType}
and t2.notice_type in(2,3)
and c2.carousel_start_time <= #{vo.currentTime} and c2.carousel_end_time >= #{vo.currentTime}
and t2.delete_state=1 order by readState asc, createdTime desc

SELECT t.id AS targetId, CASE WHEN t.notice_type != 4 THEN c.notice_type ELSE t.notice_type END AS notice_type,
CASE WHEN t.notice_type != 4 THEN c.notice_title_i18n_code ELSE t.notice_title_i18n_code END AS notice_title_i18n_code,
CASE WHEN t.notice_type != 4 THEN c.message_content_i18n_code ELSE t.message_content_i18n_code END AS message_content_i18n_code,
t.read_state, t.created_time, t.title_convert_value, t.content_convert_value, t.system_message_code, c.pic_icon_i18n_code FROM user_notice_target t LEFT JOIN user_notice_config c ON c.id = t.notice_id WHERE t.user_id = #{vo.userId} AND t.read_state = 0 AND t.revoke_state = 1 AND t.delete_state = 1 AND t.platform = 2 ORDER BY created_time DESC limit 1

select t2.notice_id as noticeId, t2.id as targetId, t2.notice_type, t2.created_time as createdTime, t2.read_state as readState from user_notice_target t2 where t2.user_id = #{vo.agentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t2.revoke_state = 1 and t2.read_state = 0 and t2.platform = 2
and t2.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType}
and t2.notice_type in(2,3)
and t2.delete_state=1

select c.id as noticeId, 0 as targetId, case when c.notice_type=1 then 1 when c.notice_type=2 or c.notice_type=3 then 2 else c.notice_type end as noticeType, c.notice_title_i18n_code, c.message_content_i18n_code, c.target_type, c.status ,c.created_time as createdTime
,0 as readState
from user_notice_config c, agent_info ag
where c.target_type = 4 and c.status=0 and ag.agent_account = #{vo.agentAccount} and not exists ( select t.notice_id from user_notice_target t where t.notice_id = c.id and t.user_account = #{vo.agentAccount} )
and c.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType}
and c.notice_type in(2,3)
and c.created_time >= ag.register_time
union
select c2.id as noticeId,t2.id as targetId, c2.notice_type, c2.notice_title_i18n_code, c2.message_content_i18n_code, c2.target_type, c2.status ,c2.created_time as createdTime
,t2.read_state as readState
from user_notice_target t2 INNER join user_notice_config c2 on c2.id = t2.notice_id
where t2.user_id = #{vo.agentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and t2.revoke_state = 1
and t2.notice_type = #{vo.noticeType}
and t2.notice_type in(2,3)
and t2.delete_state=1

(SELECT t.id AS targetId, CASE WHEN t.notice_type != 4 THEN t.notice_type ELSE t.notice_type END AS notice_type,
CASE WHEN t.notice_type != 4 THEN c.notice_title_i18n_code ELSE t.notice_title_i18n_code END AS notice_title_i18n_code,
CASE WHEN t.notice_type != 4 THEN c.message_content_i18n_code ELSE t.message_content_i18n_code END AS message_content_i18n_code,
t.read_state, t.created_time, t.title_convert_value, t.content_convert_value, t.system_message_code, c.pic_icon_i18n_code FROM user_notice_target t LEFT JOIN user_notice_config c ON c.id = t.notice_id WHERE t.user_id = #{vo.userId} AND t.read_state = 0 AND t.revoke_state = 1 AND t.platform = #{vo.platform} AND (c.status = 1 OR t.notice_type = 4)
AND t.notice_type = 1
AND t.notice_type in (3,4)
AND (c.terminal IS NULL OR c.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, c.terminal)) )
UNION All
( SELECT t.id,t.notice_type,c.notice_title_i18n_code,c.message_content_i18n_code,t.read_state,t.created_time,t.title_convert_value,t.content_convert_value,t.system_message_code,c.pic_icon_i18n_code FROM user_notice_target t INNER JOIN user_notice_config c ON c.id=t.notice_id WHERE t.user_id=#{vo.userId} AND t.revoke_state = 1 AND t.delete_state = 1 AND t.read_state = 1 AND t.platform = #{vo.platform} and c.status=1
AND t.notice_type = 1
AND t.notice_type in (3,4)
AND (c.terminal IS NULL OR c.terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, c.terminal))
UNION ( SELECT t.id, t.notice_type, t.notice_title_i18n_code, t.message_content_i18n_code, t.read_state, t.created_time, t.title_convert_value, t.content_convert_value, t.system_message_code, NULL AS pic_icon FROM user_notice_target t WHERE t.user_id = #{vo.userId}
AND t.delete_state = 1 AND t.read_state = 1
AND t.notice_type = 1
AND t.notice_type in (3,4)
AND t.platform = #{vo.platform} AND t.notice_id IS NULL ) )
ORDER BY read_state ASC, created_time DESC

select count(c.id) FROM user_notice_target c LEFT JOIN agent_info ag on c.user_id = ag.agent_id
where 1 =1 and c.user_id = #{agentId} and c.revoke_state = 1 and c.read_state = 0
and c.notice_type = #{noticeType}
and c.notice_type in(2,3)
and c.created_time >= ag.register_time

select count(c.id) from user_notice_target c left join agent_info ag on ag.agent_account=c.user_account where c.target_type = 5 and c.delete_state=1 and c.user_account = #{agentAccount} and c.notice_type = 3 and c.read_state=0

SELECT id as targetId,notice_title_i18n_code ,message_content_i18n_code,pic_icon FROM user_notice_config WHERE site_code=#{vo.siteCode} and pop_up_type = 2 and platform=2 and notice_type=#{vo.noticeType} and (terminal IS NULL OR terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, terminal)) ORDER BY sort asc,created_time DESC limit 5

SELECT id as targetId,notice_title_i18n_code ,message_content_i18n_code FROM user_notice_config WHERE site_code=#{vo.siteCode} and pop_up_type = 1 and platform=2 and notice_type=#{vo.noticeType} and (terminal IS NULL OR terminal = '' OR FIND_IN_SET(#{vo.deviceTerminal}, terminal)) ORDER BY sort asc, created_time desc limit 5
